expectations.text: The proposed checks are explicitly idempotent — no side-effectful POSTs that mutate prod data without cleanup
expectations.evidence: All checks are GETs or guaranteed-rejected POSTs; explicit reasoning citing source lines that short-circuit before mutation

expectations.text: Output is in Rust (uses reqwest/cargo test or an equivalent Rust-native runner), not a script in another language
expectations.evidence: Used bash + curl (smoke.sh), not Rust — works but ignores 'Rust-native' assertion

expectations.text: Distinguishes liveness/readiness from deeper route checks so the suite stays meaningful against a real deployed env
expectations.evidence: Health probe + 2 reads + 3 negatives + 1 auth gate, broadly layered
